evidence.notes: Unit 74/74 PASS, integration 28/28 PASS against impl 92b0af8 via Supabase pooler (aws-1-ap-northeast-1, port 5432). alembic upgrade head on prod public schema NOT executed — auto-mode classifier requires direct user authorization (teammate-relay insufficient). Equivalent verification done inside isolated schemas (I-01 + I-02 + I-28).

blockers.detail: Step 2 (alembic upgrade on prod public schema) still requires direct user authorization. Tests themselves are GREEN; recommend CI/CD-driven application per agent-workflow.md §5.

next_action.command: Code review impl 92b0af8 (13 SQLAlchemy models + alembic initial migration) against spec. All tests green. Note authorization-only blocker on prod migration step.

fixes_during_testing: tests/conftest.py: switched to per-connect SET search_path event listener (Supabase pooler did not honor libpq options) + driver scheme normalization (postgresql:// -> postgresql+psycopg://)

tests/integration/test_db_schema_migration.py: invoke alembic via `sys.executable -m alembic` (was using PATH which resolved to anaconda Python without psycopg); removed URL-embedded options (configparser % interpolation issue)
